zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Throckmorton III於1271年出生在英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓時，他的父親Simon de Throckmorton21歲，母親Isabel De Donnisley16歲。他於1290年與Joan de Weston在英國斯塔福爾牛頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1335年在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Throckmorton III于1271年出生在英国武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓时，他的父亲Simon de Throckmorton21岁，母亲Isabel De Donnisley16岁。他于1290年与Joan de Weston在英国斯塔福爾牛頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1335年在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Throckmorton III was born in 1271, in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England, his father, Simon de Throckmorton, was 21 and his mother, Isabel De Donnisley, was 16. He married Joan de Weston in 1290, in Newton, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1335, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Coughton, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Throckmorton III est né en 1271, à Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Simon de Throckmorton, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel De Donnisley, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Weston en 1290, à Newton, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1335, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Throckmorton III 1271 in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Throckmorton 21 und seine Mutter Isabel De Donnisley 16. Er hat 1290 in Newton, Staffordshire, England Joan de Weston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1335 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Coughton, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Throckmorton III è nato il nel 1271 nel Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Simon de Throckmorton, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isabel De Donnisley, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Weston nel 1290, nel Newton, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1335, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Coughton, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Throckmorton IIIが1271年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスロクモートンで生まれた時，父Simon de Throckmortonは21歳，母Isabel De Donnisleyは16歳であった。1290年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアニュートンでJoan de Westonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1335年に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Throckmorton III(이)가 1271년 영국 워스스터실르 스록모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Throckmorton(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel De Donnisley(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1290년 영국 스태퍼드실르 뉴턴에서 Joan de Weston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Fladbury, Worcestershire, England, Unite: Fladbury, Wigreceastrescīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Throckmorton III nasceu em 1271, em Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon de Throckmorton, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabel De Donnisley, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Weston em 1290, em Newton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1335, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Throckmorton III родился в 1271 г. в местности троккмортон, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon de Throckmorton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel De Donnisley, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Weston в 1290 г. в местности нютон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1335 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия.

sm.between 1311 and 1335: mai le 1311 e o'o I le 1335

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Throckmorton III nació en 1271, en Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon de Throckmorton, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabel De Donnisley, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Joan de Weston en 1290, en Newton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1335, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
